zh.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Lewys是Flewys ap Rhys的女兒，於1175年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根拉迪爾。她與Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr在威爾士格拉莫爾根拉迪爾結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1280年在她的家鄉享年106歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根拉迪爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Lewys是Flewys ap Rhys的女儿，于1175年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根拉迪爾。她与Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr在威尔士格拉莫爾根拉迪爾结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1280年在她的家乡享年106岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根拉迪爾。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Lewys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Lewis, Leweis, Lowis, from ancient Germanic (originally West Frankish) Hludwig (itself from hlōd- ‘fame, famous’ + wīg- ‘battle’). This was Latinized as Ludovicus and Chlodovisus, which were gallicized as Clovis or Clouis, French Louis. The name may also appear as Lawis, Laweys, Lawes, by unrounding of the vowel of Lowis on the analogy of the variation between Low and Law as pet forms of Middle English Lourence alias Laurence. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Laws 2 and compare Lawrence .
Welsh: adopted for the Welsh personal name Llywelyn (see Llewellyn ).

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh’. This is one of the most common Old Irish personal names. It is derived from Lugh ‘brightness’, which was the name of a Celtic god.

variants.name: Laws
meanings: English: variant of Law (pet form of Lawrence ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Perhaps a shortened form of Scottish or Irish   McLeish  . Compare   McLaws  .

variants.name: Lewison
meanings: Welsh and English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name   Lewis   (in Wales this was taken as equivalent to the Welsh personal name   Llewelyn  ). In North America, this surname has reportedly absorbed in some cases the Greek patronymic   Iliopoulos  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): patronymic from the personal name Lewi, Polish-influenced form of Levy .

variants.name: McGlew
meanings: Irish: most probably from Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh’, a Gaelic personal name (referencing the god Lugh), sometimes Anglicized as Lewis . However, both Woulfe and MacLysaght consider McGlew to be a shortened form of Mac Dhuinnshléibhe (see McAleavey and Dunleavy ).

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

en.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Lewys was born in 1175, in Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom as the daughter of Flewys ap Rhys. She married Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr in Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1280, in her hometown, at the age of 106, and was buried in Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Lewys est née en 1175, à Radyr, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fille de Flewys ap Rhys. Elle a épousé Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr à Radyr, Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1280, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 106 ans, et a été enterrée à Radyr, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Lewys wurde 1175 in Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Flewys ap Rhys geboren. Sie hat in Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1280 im Alter von 106 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Lewys è nata il nel 1175 nel Radyr, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito come figlia di Flewys ap Rhys. Lei sposato Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr nel Radyr, Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1280, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 106 anni, e fu sepolta a Radyr, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Lewysは1175年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンラディルでFlewys ap Rhysの娘として生まれた。ウェールズグラモーガンラディルでCynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1280年に故郷で106歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズグラモーガンラディルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Lewys(은)는 1175년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 라디르에서 Flewys ap Rhys의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 웨일스 글램르건 라디르에서 Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1280년 그녀의 고향에서 106세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 글램르건 라디르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Lewys nasceu em 1175, em Radyr, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom filha de Flewys ap Rhys. Ela casou-se com Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr em Radyr, Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1280, em sua cidade natal, com 106 anos, e foi sepultada em Radyr, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Lewys родилась в 1175 г. в местности радир, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. Её отца звали Flewys ap Rhys. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr в местности радир, глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1280 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 106 лет и была похоронена в местности радир, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Lewys nació en 1175, en Radyr, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido como hija de Flewys ap Rhys. Se casó con Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr en Radyr, Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1280, en su pueblo, a la edad de 106 años, y fue sepultada en Radyr, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido.
